# Test Case Design - ChargingCtrl

High-level test cases for the **ChargingCtrl** architecture model. Charging Control (introduced R3.0): AC/DC charging state machine, control pilot and metering.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - acdc init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Chg_Acdc_Init` then `Chg_Acdc_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-CHG-ACD7)
